modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Automatic slide timings with narrations in PowerPoint not clear.

full_description_text: User wants to know about automatic slide timings. They are confused about how narrations work with it. There is no clear explanation provided. Need more info on this feature.
